description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa featuring a minimalist design with a rectangular seat and backrest, both upholstered in smooth black material. The seat and back cushions are visually distinct, separated into two equal sections, and appear to be firmly attached to the frame. The frame is constructed from light-colored wood, with simple, straight legs and a horizontal wooden support bar running along the back. The sofa lacks traditional armrests, instead featuring short, rounded wooden extensions at each end of the backrest. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, making it suitable for urban parks, waiting areas, or public spaces.
description: A sleek, black two-seater sofa with a light wood frame, divided seat and back cushions, and minimalist styling without armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, two separate black cushions for both seat and back, and the wooden frame beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the cushions, and the absence of armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the horizontal wooden support bar and the back of the two black cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, again showing the sofa's depth and cushion profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two seat cushions and two back cushions, all uniform in size, placed side by side and firmly attached to the frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Armrests are absent; only short, rounded wooden extensions at the back corners provide minimal lateral boundary.
attribute_leg_design: Four straight, cylindrical wooden legs positioned at the corners, with a visible light wood texture and an exposed, simple design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest divided into two equal segments, each with a separate cushion, continuous across the width.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black upholstery with a smooth, untextured finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
